# Portal.view.learn.ContentView: provide the ability to mount neo components into the learning section content

example:
```
<pre data-neo-component>
{
    "cls" : "neo-worker-setup",
    "tag" : "element-loader",
    "vdom": {"src": "../../resources/images/workers-focus.svg"}
}
</pre>
```
